_doc: Human-labelled findings to validate the LLM-as-judge BEFORE trusting it at scale. label = a human's strong/weak verdict. Target judge agreement: 75-90%. Read disagreements: they reveal whether the rubric is unclear or the judge lacks context (see RUBRIC.md).

finding.title: VAT registration overdue
finding.detail: Turnover R12.0m exceeds the R1m threshold but the entity is not VAT registered, breaching VAT Act 89 of 1991 s23.
finding.recommendation: Register for VAT within 21 business days via SARS eFiling

finding.title: Gross margin 8pp below sector
finding.detail: Gross margin 27.5% vs retail sector 35.8%; the 8.3pp gap is ~R1.0m of margin on R12m revenue.
finding.recommendation: Renegotiate top-5 supplier terms and re-price slow lines within 60 days

finding.title: Debtor days 70 vs 45
finding.detail: Receivables turn in ~70 days vs sector 45, locking up ~R0.8m of cash.
finding.recommendation: Introduce 7-day deposit terms and a 2% early-settlement discount
finding.cost_of_inaction: Persistent overdraft reliance and finance cost

finding.title: SDL exemption likely missed
finding.detail: Annual payroll ~R6.2m exceeds the R500k SDL threshold; no SDL registration evident.
finding.recommendation: Register for SDL with SARS and backdate where required

finding.title: Concentration risk
finding.detail: The business appears exposed to a single channel.

finding.title: Operational inefficiencies noted
finding.detail: There may be inefficiencies in operations that could be improved.

finding.title: Risk of non-compliance
finding.detail: The company may face compliance risks in future.

finding.title: Interest cover 1.5x — fragile
finding.detail: Operating profit R0.66m covers finance costs R0.44m only 1.5x; below the 2.0x lenders expect.
finding.recommendation: Restructure short-term debt to longer tenor and cut R0.3m discretionary opex
finding.cost_of_inaction: Covenant breach / refinancing at higher rates
